title: 8 Pcs Silver Pull Bows for Gift Wrapping, 5.9 Inch Organza Chiffon Yarn Present Bow for Wedding Car, Christmas, Valentine's Day, Birthday, Party Decoration
features: Pull Bows for Gift Wrapping: We supply 8 pull bows measuring 5 x 129 cm, in sufficient quantity to meet gift wrapping requirements, which can enhance the appeal of presents
Bright Colors: Pull bows in different bright colors create stunning flowers, creating a festive, cheerful and romantic visual effect to meet your different color matching needs

Premium Material: The pull bows are made of organza, which is silky soft, not easy to break, and non-fading. The design features shiny stripes, adding a touch of elegance and attractiveness to the gift
Easy to Operate: Simply unfold the pull bow, locate the two delicate ribbons, and gently pull them out to form a stunning ring-shaped flower

Various Occasions: Pull bows can be used for important occasions such as weddings, Christmas, New Year, Valentine's Day, Easter, Mother's Day, Father's Day, birthdays, etc.. It is a perfect decoration for gift wrapping, gift baskets, bouquets, wedding cars and parties
